sqlMap.select: select * from payment where order_id in (select order_id from mem_order where mem_id = #mem_id# and order_status = '결제완료')
select c.pay_name as pay_type, b.pay_price from mem_order a, payment b, pay_method c where a.order_id = b.order_id and b.pay_type = c.pay_type and a.order_id = #order_id#
sqlMap.insert: insert into delivery values(#order_id#, #del_addr#, #mem_id#, #del_no# , (select sysdate + 2 from dual), '배송준비중')
